programme.desc: Pujya Gurudev Shri Kanji Swami, a Jainism teacher, was deeply influenced by Kundakunda's Samayasara in 1932. He lectured on these teachings for 45 years.

programme.title: Parswanath Chalisa
programme.desc: Parshwanath Chalisa is a collection of devotional hymns celebrating Lord Parshwanath in Jainism. It's a heartfelt tribute that expresses devotion and admiration for this revered figure.

programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of popular religious songs and hymns by renowned artists, played continuously. Experience divine music and spiritual enrichment.

programme.title: Pujya Lalitprabh Ji & Chandrabh Ji M.S

programme.title: Pujya Shree Premachary Ji (Pappaji
programme.desc: Pujya Shree Premacharyji Pappaji offers an insightful discourse on scriptures, sharing profound teachings with devotees. Join us for spiritual wisdom and guidance.

programme.title: Radiator Springs Road Trip
programme.desc: Lightning McQueen's friends travel to California to support him in a race. They discover a rival is plotting against him and rush to warn him.

programme.title: Rescue Squad Mater

programme.title: Tractor Trouble
programme.desc: Lightning and Mater want to relax by tractor tipping. They accidentally release the tractors! Can they round them up in time? Read along to find out in this fun adventure!

programme.title: Unidentified Flying Mater

programme.title: Tiana And Her Loyal Friend
programme.desc: When Charlotte and Big Daddy LaBouff went at Tiana's Palace, they don't realize that their dog, Stella, has tagged along. Can Princess Tiana calm down Stella and help her and Louis become friends?

programme.title: Mickey Meets Pluto
programme.desc: Featuring six classic Mickey Mouse tales, this collection of stories is perfect for little ones at bedtime or any time!

programme.title: Crash Boom Roar
programme.desc: What sounds does Arlo the dinosaur hear? From a booming storm to a crackling fire, Arlo and his new friend Spot listen to the many sounds around them.

programme.title: You'Ve Gotta Be Kitten Me
programme.desc: Mischievous kittens cause chaos and delight. Amid humor and playful troubles, love and joy emerge, showing how mischief brings unexpected happiness.

programme.title: We'Ll Always Have Each Other
programme.desc: The seasons are changing in Arendelle, and fall has arrived. Follow along with word-for-word narration as Anna and Olaf discover that even with a new season, there are some things that never change.

programme.title: Go Stitch Go
programme.desc: What happens when a lonely little Hawaiian girl adopts a pet that is actually an experiment-gone-wrong from an alien planet? Join the fun with the ever-lovable Lilo and Stitch.

programme.title: Peaches Pie, Take A Bath
programme.desc: In this Level Pre-1 Reader, Alma's doll, Peaches Pie, loses its lovely scent after being dragged by Rudy's dog, Doc.

programme.title: Always Time For A Laugh
programme.desc: Mike Wazowski, top laugh collector at Monster's Inc., can't figure out why kids are falling asleep on him. Follow the narration as Mike learns the joke is on him!

programme.title: Starry Starry Night
programme.desc: One starry night, Doc's friend, Henry, brings his brand-new toy telescope, to Doc's house to watch a meteor shower. Right before the shower begins, Henry discovers that his telescope isn't working.

programme.title: Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: Doc loves popping bubbles with her friends Emmie and Alma, but when their toy Bubble Monkey runs out of bubble soap, there are no bubbles to pop.

programme.title: Bambi
programme.desc: This collection of favorite Disney bedtime stories is perfect for little dreamers. Follow the word-for-word narration for cuddly moments before sleep!

programme.title: Unlikely Friends
programme.desc: When Kion gets separated from the rest of the Lion Guard, he gets lost in the Outlands! Kion has to be careful while he's in hyena territory because all hyenas are dangerous . . . or are they?

programme.title: Babysitter Bunga
programme.desc: Bunga becomes the unorthodox babysitter in the Pride Lands, teaching kids how to defend themselves. Follow the narration as they use his lessons to fight off the jackals!

programme.title: The Little Mermaid
programme.desc: Ariel longs to explore the human world. When the evil Ursula the offers her a bargain find out what Ariel will do for a chance at her dreams.

programme.title: Spirits Of Nature
programme.desc: Elsa meets the spirits of nature who live in the Enchanted Forest!

programme.title: Fire Pup Of The Day
programme.desc: Enjoy new stories about Disney and Pixar's furry friends! Join the 101 Dalmatians, Dug, Lilo, and Stitch in adventures. Perfect for any time!

programme.title: Alice In Wonderland
programme.desc: Bedtime stories are classic, even for the littlest dreamers. Follow along with word-for-word narration in this collection of favorite Disney stories that's perfect for those cuddly moments!

programme.title: Good Night Thumper
programme.desc: Enjoy six sweet Disney Bunnies stories with Thumper and friends! This collection features word-for-word narration, perfect for bedtime or any story time. Snuggle up and read along!

programme.title: Thumper And The Noisy Ducky
programme.desc: This show has six cute stories about Thumper and his friends. You can read along with the words as you listen. It's great for bedtime or any time you want a sweet story!

programme.title: Toy Hospital
programme.desc: Enjoy quick adventures with your Disney Junior pals! Bingo, Rolly, Mickey, and Mira star in stories perfect for bedtime or any quick reading break. Fun for all!

programme.title: You'Re It, Dory
programme.desc: Dive into Disney and Pixar stories! Join Ariel, Nemo, and Moana on exciting adventures. This narrated collection is perfect for bedtime or any time you want a fun story.

programme.title: The Dragon Boat Race
programme.desc: This collection features enchanting stories perfect for quick, five-minute reads. Ideal for bedtime or any story time, join the princesses on their captivating journeys.

programme.title: Father'S Day Countdown
programme.desc: Enjoy five-minute Disney Junior stories! Join Bingo and Rolly on missions, help Mira solve mysteries, and have fun with Mickey and friends. Perfect for any time!

programme.title: One Small Ruff For Pup-Kind
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly embark on exciting adventures in space and their neighborhood! These short, five-minute stories are perfect for reading aloud. Enjoy fun tales at bedtime or anytime!

programme.title: The French Toast Connection
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on fun missions! These short stories are perfect for reading aloud. Enjoy bark-tastic adventures in space and at home in just five minutes.

programme.title: Ratatouille

programme.desc: It's Mickey Mouse's birthday, and he's sure his friends are throwing him a party. There's just one problem . . . there are no signs of a party. Have Mickey's friends forgotten all about his big day?

programme.desc: Join Mickey and his friends in a series of tales that will warm your heart. In this story, mean old Ebenezer Scrooge is visited by several ghosts urging him to be more generous and kind-hearted.

programme.title: Mickey'S Spooky Night
programme.desc: Read about your favorite Disney characters and their spooky adventures!

programme.desc: With this sweet collection of Disney Christmas stories, little ones are sure to be carried off to sleep full of holiday cheer.

programme.title: The Haunted Halloween

programme.title: Minnie's Surprise

programme.desc: Mickey and the gang head to Italy to compete in the Race for the Rigatoni Ribbon. Do the Roadster Racers have a chance at winning the race? Follow along with word-for-word narration to find out!

programme.title: A Hot-Dog Day
programme.desc: When Minnie plans a picnic for Daisy and friends, they all pitch in with the help of a misplaced basket.

programme.title: Minnie-rella
programme.desc: The fairy tale is based on the story of Cindrella. Minnie Mouse falls asleep while doing chores and dreams that she becomes Minnierella! She needs help to get ready for Prince Mickey's Grand Ball.

programme.title: Colors All Around
programme.desc: Join Mickey, Minnie, and the rest of the gane as they search for their favorite colors. Follow along with word-for-word narration and help them find all the colors in the rainbow!

programme.title: Mickey Saves Santa
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends are all ready for a Christmas Eve sleepover at the Clubhouse. They've written their lists and can't wait for Santa Claus to arrive. Santa won't be coming unless he gets some help!

programme.title: Mickey's Easter Hunt
programme.desc: The Clubhouse pals are throwing an Easter party and Pete's upset because he thinks he isn't invited. Pete decides to make a change in the Clubhouse, he makes it disappear-with the friends still inside!

programme.title: Mickey's Halloween Treat
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends want to go to the Tower, for the Halloween party but, they have to get there before the moon is full! Toodles and Mouseketools are what Mickey need to find on his way to the tower.

programme.title: Minnie's Rainbow
programme.desc: In this colorful tale, Minnie Mouse simply explains how these beautiful apparitions are formed. Follow the narration as Minnie and her Clubhouse pals begin to see a world of rainbows around them.

programme.title: Top O' The Clubhouse
programme.desc: It's Saint Patrick's Day. Mickey and the gang are ready to celebrate! But when Pete's shenanigans threaten to ruin their celebration, it will take some help from Toodles, to get the party back on track.

programme.title: Homesick
programme.desc: Being sick is no fun for anyone, but Funny's sneezes are extra funny! Every sneeze sends Mickey, Minnie, and the rest of the gang through the wrong Adventure Doors. Will Funny ever feel better?

programme.title: Donald'S Stinky Day
programme.desc: When Donald accidentally rescues a cute little skunk, the grateful little stinker refuses to leave his side!

programme.title: Mickey'S Perfecto Day
programme.desc: Mickey and the Roadster Racers head to Madrid, Spain for some racing and sightseeing fun. But when a baby bull begins to chase them around town, their perfecto vacation starts to crumble!

programme.title: Ski Trippin
programme.desc: The gang is teaching Daisy to ski when she accidentally ends up in the middle of aa big skiing race! Using the skills she's learned along the way, can she pull off a big win?

programme.title: Hocus Bow-Cus

programme.title: Minnie's Pet Salon
programme.desc: Minnie and friends get ready to pamper their pets at Minnie's Pet Salon! It's a spa day like no other for Pluto, Figaro, Bella, Butch, and Mr. Pettibone!

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Sparkle-izer
programme.desc: Who's been using Minnie's new Sparkle-izer? When Minnie needs it to decorate her customers' bows, the Super Sparkle-izer turns up missing! It's up to Millie and Melody to solve the mystifying mystery!

programme.title: Always In Fashion
programme.desc: Minnie Mouse is always in fashion! She and Daisy love making bows at Minnie's Bow-tique. All of their friends want Minnie to make them bows.

programme.title: Blooming Bows
programme.desc: Minnie's nieces are very upset! The paper petals on their costumes are falling apart. Now, it''s up to Minnie to redesign the girls' costumes. But can she do it in time for the school's Posy Pageant?

programme.title: Bow-Bot Robot
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy get some help from a bow-making robot in this retelling of an episode of Disney Junior's Minnie's Bow Toons.

programme.title: Easter Bonnet Parade
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! One day, a little puppy with nowhere to go arrived at the Main Street USA train station. Seeking for a place to call his own, follow along as the little pup explores the town.

programme.title: Trouble Times Two
programme.desc: Movie star Penelope Poodle has come to Minnie''s Bow-Tique to find something perfect to wear. But when Minnie''s mischievous twin nieces, Millie and Melody, come for a visit, it''s Trouble Times Two!

programme.title: Year Round Fun
programme.desc: Book with magnet set in a case

programme.title: Riches To Rags
programme.desc: A young boy is taken to work by his Papa and Grandpa in an old wooden boat. He discovers his family's unusual line of work and will decide whether to follow them or find his way.

programme.title: Blue-Ribbon Bunny
programme.desc: Sofia and her bunny Clover enter a pet contest. Other kids have fancy pets. Sofia must decide: enter with a fancy pet or stay loyal to her best friend, Clover.

programme.title: Clover Time
programme.desc: When Clover's warren floods, Sofia invites her to move in. They love sharing a room-at first. But Sofia soon learns that being roommates isn't always easy in this fun story!

programme.title: Just One Of The Princes
programme.desc: Sofia wants to try out for a spot on Royal Prep's Flying Derby team, but Amber, Prince Hugo, and her classmates tell Sofia that Flying Derby is not a 'princess thing.'

programme.title: The Missing Necklace
programme.desc: When the Amulet of Avalor goes missing, Sofia loses her ability to understand her friends. Longing to talk to her friends again, Sofia sets off to find it. Cedric is also after the missing amulet.

programme.title: Welcome To Royal Prep
programme.desc: At Royal Prep's Open House, Amber's special painting gets ruined by James! Can Sofia help her fix it before her parents arrive? Find out in this exciting story!

programme.title: Me And Our Mom
programme.desc: Sofia is so excited to spend the day with her mom at the annual Mother's Day Picnic -until she learns that Amber and James are joining too. Sofia wants her mom to herself on Mother's Day!

programme.title: The Curse Of Princess Ivy
programme.desc: In this beautifully illustrated eBook, Sofia faces grave danger when she faces Princess Ivy, a once-exiled princess who is determined to take over Enchancia and turn the whole kingdom black and white.

programme.title: A Royal Mouse In The House
programme.desc: It's the Enchancia Pet Show! Hildegard's mink, Lulu, runs away, and Hildegard turns into a mouse! Sofia and Clover must solve the mystery and reverse the spell before the show begins.

programme.title: Princess Sofia'S Busy Day
programme.desc: Today is another busy day in the kingdom of Enchancia for Princess Sofia. Join Sofia and see what an ordinary day is like for this new princess!

programme.title: Royal Fun
programme.desc: Life in Enchancia is full of fun! Join Sofia as she explores all the fun things there are to do-from dancing to joining the flying derby team and even spending the day at the Village Faire.

programme.title: Sofia The First
programme.desc: Sofia was a little girl who lived a rather ordinary life. But everything changed when her mother married the king.

programme.title: The Amulet And The Anthem
programme.desc: Sofia is chosen to sing the Enchancian Anthem at the annual Harvest Festival. After she becomes a bit too boastful, Sofia's magical amulet bestows a curse on her, leaving her all croaked up!

programme.title: The Enchanted Science Fair
programme.desc: When Sofia and her friends discover that they need to find a magical ingredient at the top of a mountain, they compete to see who can reach the summit first! Can Sofia convince her fellow students.

programme.title: A Mother's Love
programme.desc: Follow Princess Merida and her mother Queen Elinor on an epic adventure set in the Highlands of Scotland. When a beastly curse is unleashed upon the kingdom, Merida must try and set things right.

programme.title: Big Bear, Little Bear
programme.desc: Enter the world of Brave and learn about opposites.

programme.title: Oh, Brother
programme.desc: Meet Merida, a fearless princess with three siblings who are in trouble. Read and listen to the story to learn what happens when they transform into bear cubs. Will Merida rescue them in time?

programme.title: Merida And The Missing Gem
programme.desc: Join the Disney reading. Merida chooses a beautiful brooch for her mother's birthday, but the pin goes missing, and she, with friends, has to search the castle grounds to find it.

programme.title: One Perfect Day
programme.desc: Despite being instructed to behave like a typical princess, Disney's Princess Merida desires to practice archery, explore the kingdom, and be herself for a day.

programme.title: Cinderella's Best Ever Creations
programme.desc: The story explores how Cinderella must work to create a collection of dresses in a time-crunch. She creates beautiful gowns for girls and solves problems by creating an extra dress in a time crunch.

programme.title: The Great Cat-tastrophe
programme.desc: Cinderella agrees to help Lady Dupont watch the cats, Cinderella finds a clever way for them to lend a hand on her chores. Follow along as Cinderella and the cats tidy up the house together.

programme.title: Kindness And Courage
programme.desc: Ella's stepfamily is jeaous of her beauty and grace and tries to stop her from going to the royal ball. Will Ella make it to the ball and get her happily ever after?

programme.title: Moana Finds The Way
programme.desc: Moana sets sail on a great adventure across the ocean. Follow along with the word for word narration.

programme.title: Beware Of The Kakamora
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! While on their important voyage, Moana and Maui encounter the dangerous Kakamora. Follow along with the word for word narration in this exciting adventure.

programme.title: Moana
programme.desc: Mater is tasked with capturing suspicious vehicles because he is a spy vehicle! See what a spy's life is like for Mater and his friends by following the narration word for word.

programme.title: Moana And The Ocean
programme.desc: An engaging story about Moana's unique relationship with the Ocean that playfully interacts with stylized artwork.

programme.title: Our Perfect Stormy Day
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! When a storm hits the island, Moana, Heihei, and Pua head to Gramma Tala's for story time. Follow along with word-for-word narration as they all enjoy the perfect stormy day!

programme.title: Where Monsters Live
programme.desc: Moana, daughter of chief Tui, embarks on a journey to return the heart of goddess Te Fitti from Maui, a demigod, after the plants and the fish on her island start dying due to a blight.

programme.title: The Guardian Of The Dragon Gem
programme.desc: In Kumandra, Raya, a brave warrior, seeks the last dragon. She gathers a team to restore light and unity to their world. It's a fantasy adventure.

programme.title: A Path to the Sea
programme.desc: Come along with Disney Princesses on their magical adventures. Each story in this collection is perfect for reading aloud in just five minutes.

programme.title: Meet Blondie And Berry
programme.desc: Meet Blondie, a pony with royal aspirations, and Berry, a food-loving bunny, as they form unexpected friendships with Rapunzel and Snow White in enchanting adventures.

programme.title: Rapunzel's Heroes
programme.desc: Join Disney's captivating adventure! On Rapunzel's 18th birthday, she explores life outside the tower with Flynn and Maximus, embarking on an exciting journey to the kingdom!

programme.title: A Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Tinker Bell tries her hand at being an animal, water, and light fairy, learning new skills and discovering her hidden talents as she explores the magical world of Pixie Hollow with her friends.

programme.title: Babysitter Bunga
programme.desc: Bunga becomes the unorthodox babysitter in the Pride Lands, teaching kids how to defend themselves. Follow the narration as they use his lessons to fight off the jackals!

programme.title: Starry Starry Night
programme.desc: One starry night, Doc's friend, Henry, brings his brand-new toy telescope, to Doc's house to watch a meteor shower. Right before the shower begins, Henry discovers that his telescope isn't working.

programme.title: A Friend In The Wild
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! What if the cataclysmic asteroid that forever changed life on Earth actually missed the planet completely and giant dinosaurs never became extinct?

programme.title: Toy Story
programme.desc: Of all the toys in Andy's room, Woody the cowboy is his favorite. But when Andy receives a brand-new toy for his birthday-a space ranger named Buzz Lightyear-Woody suddenly loses his number-one spot.

programme.title: A Pet Problem
programme.desc: Join Disney's Frozen characters in this fun, full-color early-reader book, exploring opposites with Anna, Kristoff, and Olaf, based on the hit comedy-adventure movie.

programme.title: The Legend Of Sleepy Hollow
programme.desc: A classic tale of mystery unfolds when a headless rider haunts a small town, blending suspense, folklore, and fear while showing the clash between superstition and courage.

programme.title: Beyond The Palace Walls
programme.desc: Princess Jasmine has dreams that go far beyond the palace walls. When she ventures into the kingdom beyond her home, will she find the adventure she longs for?

programme.title: Puppy Trouble
programme.desc: Nanny takes all fifteen puppies to play in the park. One of the puppies, Lucky, can be quite a troublemaker. Follow along with word-for-word narration as Lucky makes his way of out of mischief.

programme.title: The Puppies' First Christmas
programme.desc: With this sweet collection of Disney Christmas stories, little ones are sure to be carried off to sleep full of holiday cheer.

programme.title: Thunderbolt Patch
programme.desc: When Patch the puppy notices a mouse in the house, he pretends to be his TV hero, Thunderbolt the Dog and leads the pups on a wild chase after the bandit. Everyone will love the world of 101 Dalmatians.

programme.title: A Lion's Pride
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! Explore the life of a lioness and her cub on the African plains through this photo-filled storybook. Perfect for young fans!

programme.title: A Friend Like Him
programme.desc: Few characters have Aladdin's singing, dancing, and joke-telling Genie's unique, irresistible appeal. This delightful picture book is ideal for any Aladdin fan who imagined having a friend like Genie.

programme.title: A Present For The Queen
programme.desc: Alice searches for a Christmas gift for the Queen of Hearts.

programme.title: The Coziest Carriage
programme.desc: When Scat Cat's home in the junkyard disappears one day, Duchess, O'Malley and their kittens come up with a new place for their pal! See how this family helps their friend when he needs them most.

programme.title: Beauty And The Beast
programme.desc: With this sweet collection of Disney Princess stories, little ones will fall asleep dreaming of fairy-tale endings and happily ever afters.

programme.title: Belle And The Castle Puppy
programme.desc: Belle gets a puppy, making Ottoman jealous because he misses being a real dog. He runs into the woods, and Belle and the puppy must rescue him.

programme.title: Belle And The Perfect Pearl
programme.desc: When Belle finds the Beast's favourite book, she sees that the leather cover is worn out. Belle decides to look for the missing pearl and fix up the book for the Beast as a surprise!

programme.title: Belle's Friendship Invention
programme.desc: When Belle sees a crowd gathered around a blue ribbon-winning invention, she volunteers to help the inventor-a girl named Simone-demonstrate how her machine works.

programme.title: Something More
programme.desc: Illustrated throughout with fantastic film stills this book presents an overview of the people, places, and creatures to be found in the magical tale of Beauty and the Beast.

programme.title: I Am Baymax
programme.desc: This is a comedy-adventure about brilliant robotics prodigy Hiro Hamada, who finds himself in the grips of a criminal plot that threatens to destroy the fast-paced, high-tech city of San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Baymax's Journey
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! Follow Baymax as he travels through San Fransokyo in this charming storybook featuring word for word narration.

programme.title: Big Hero 6
programme.desc: Hiro, a smart kid, lives in San Fransokyo. A crime threatens the city. With friends and Baymax, a robot, Hiro becomes a hero. They must save their home!

programme.title: Fight To The Finish
programme.desc: Someone stole Hiro's invention and is using it for evil! Hiro must join forces with his friends and a robot named Baymax to save San Fransokyo before it's too late!

programme.title: Cars
programme.desc: Lightning McQueen takes to the track in three tales of speed! Follow along with word-for-word narration in this level one World of Reading reader bind up featuring Cars, Racing Days, etc.

programme.title: Driving Buddies
programme.desc: Lightning McQueen, a race car, gets lost and finds friends in a small town. He learns important life lessons. Get ready for an exciting adventure!

programme.title: Driving School
programme.desc: Lightning McQueen and Mater must teach hot rod racers the rules of Radiator Springs. This story features characters from Disney/Pixar's Cars, promising a fun-filled adventure for young readers.

programme.title: Racing Days
programme.desc: Doc and Chick Hicks hold 3 races to see whose racing school is best. While Doc's student racers follow the rules, Chick's student racers bend them.

programme.title: Racing For Good
programme.desc: Lightning McQueen and Jeff Gorvette love to race, but there is one thing they love more: helping others. In this action-packed storybook, Lightning and his friends race to raise money to help old cars.

programme.title: Rally To The Finish
programme.desc: Lightning and Mater travel to the Black Forest for a race. Lightning is excited to race through the forest, but Mater gets scared when an old car tells them that a monster lives there.

programme.title: Roadwork
programme.desc: Lightning McQueen, a race car, wants to win the Piston Cup. He ends up in Radiator Springs. McQueen learns that friendship is important.

programme.title: Francesco's Rematch
programme.desc: Lightning McQueen and his racing rival Francesco Bernoulli challenge each other to a race in Monza, Italy-Francesco's hometown. Both Lightning and Francesco are confident they will win the race.

programme.title: Mater And The Ghost Light
programme.desc: Mater the tow truck loves pranking his friends. But after he hears a scary story, Mater loses all zest for pranking. Now, he just wants to hide!

programme.title: Mater The Greater
programme.desc: Mater the Greater is a brave stunt performer who does many dangerous things in front of crowds. He jumps cars, flies through fire, and rides planes. Now, can he do his biggest stunt?

programme.title: Mater The Greater
programme.desc: Mater the Greater is a brave stunt performer who does many dangerous things in front of crowds. He jumps cars, flies through fire, and rides planes. Now, can he do his biggest stunt?

programme.title: Mater's Junkyard Jamboree
programme.desc: Mater can't wait to show his friends in Radiator Springs the junkyard jukebox he built, but they are too busy rounding up tractors on the loose-and the tractors are causing trouble everywhere they go!

programme.title: Monster Truck Mater
programme.desc: To become a world-champion monster truck wrestler, Mater must go through the ranks as a professional. I-Screamer, Captain Collision, and The Rasta Carian won't give up easily.

programme.title: Neon Racers
programme.desc: Lightning McQueen and his international racing friends are in Japan for the next leg of the T-ROC-the Transcontinental Race of Champions. But this isn't a normal race.it's a neon race!

programme.title: Radiator Springs Road Trip
programme.desc: Lightning McQueen's friends travel to California to support him in a race. They discover a rival is plotting against him and rush to warn him.

programme.title: Rescue Squad Mater
programme.desc: If there is a fire in Radiator Springs, Rescue Squad Mater is on the job! One day his best friend Lightning McQueen gets trapped in a burning building, and itis up to Mater to save him.

programme.title: The Best Present Ever
programme.desc: If there is a fire in Radiator Springs, Rescue Squad Mater is on the job! One day his best friend Lightning McQueen gets trapped in a burning building, and itis up to Mater to save him.

programme.title: Thunder And Lightning
programme.desc: Lightning McQueen, the hot-shot rookie race car, is on his way to the race of a lifetime to claim the coveted Piston Cup. But Lightning hits a bump in the road along his journey.

programme.title: Tractor Trouble
programme.desc: Lightning and Mater want to relax by tractor tipping. They accidentally release the tractors! Can they round them up in time? Read along to find out in this fun adventure!

programme.title: Unidentified Flying Mater
programme.desc: Mater decides to teach it all his favorite things to do on Earth. But when the UFO is kidnapped, Mater must go undercover to rescue his friend.

programme.title: Race Around The World
programme.desc: All the world's a racetrack as superstar Lightning McQueen zooms back into action, with his best friend Mater in tow, to take on the globe's fastest and finest.

programme.title: Secret Agent Mater
programme.desc: Mater is a spy car and he has been instructed to catch bad cars! Follow along with word-for-word narration to see what spy life is like for Mater and his friends.

programme.title: Super Spies
programme.desc: All the world's a racetrack as superstar Lightning McQueen zooms back into action, with his best friend Mater in tow, to take on the globe's fastest and finest in DisneyPixar Cars 2.

programme.title: Back On Track
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! Follow along with word-for-word narration and meet Lightning McQueen, Cruz Ramirez, and the rest of the crew from Cars 3!

programme.title: Rectangle
programme.desc: Rectangle invites young viewers on a cheerful learning journey about shapes! With colorful visuals, fun stories, and songs, kids discover all the cool things rectangles can do.

programme.title: Oval

programme.desc: A Royal Slumber Party! When Sofia invites her friends from the village to her very first royal slumber party, she's excited but nervous, too. What if her old friends don't get along with her new ones?

programme.title: Adventure at Skull Rock
programme.desc: Tinker Bell and her fairy friends embark on an adventure to retrieve the stolen Blue Pixie Dust from pirates in this Disney Fairies storybook. Follow the narration!

programme.title: Heavy Metal Mater
programme.desc: Mater and the Gas Caps, records a hit song, Mater becomes a rock legend. Then Lightning joins Mater's band for the rock concert of the century!

programme.title: The Haunted Ship
programme.desc: A thrilling fantasy tale of a haunted ship filled with mystery and adventure. With suspenseful storytelling, it takes viewers on a journey of danger, fear, and discovery.

programme.title: A Path to the Sea
programme.desc: Come along with Disney Princesses on their magical adventures. Each story in this collection is perfect for reading aloud in just five minutes.

programme.title: Party Central
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! Mike, Sulley, and the rest of the Oozma Kappas from Disney/Pixar Monsters University throw a monster of a party in this storybook based on the Disney/Pixar animated short.

programme.title: A Trick for Hook
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! With this collection of spooky Halloween stories, little ones will be tricked and treated off to sleep with some of their favorite Disney and Pixar characters.

programme.title: One Small Ruff For Pup-Kind
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly embark on exciting adventures in space and their neighborhood! These short, five-minute stories are perfect for reading aloud. Enjoy fun tales at bedtime or anytime!

programme.title: Rapunzel'S Forest Friends
programme.desc: With this collection of cuddly Disney stories, even the smallest readers are sure to be lulled into sleep with stories of friendship and love.

programme.title: Grandpa Bunny
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! Great Grandpa Bunny Bunny is the ancestral founder of Bunnyville. Follow along with word-for-word narration as he teaches each new generation of bunnies.

programme.title: A Perfect Match
programme.desc: Join Tinker Bell on a thrilling adventure and follow along as Tink travels to the forbidden Winter Woods, meets a new fairy named Periwinkle, and discover why her wings begin to sparkle and glow.

programme.title: Smitten With A Kitten
programme.desc: After Doc finds a toy kitten, she brings her home to meet the toys. Lambie falls in love with the little kitty and wants to adopt her. But anytime Lambie or the toys come close, the kitten runs away!

programme.title: A Cool Contest
programme.desc: Kristoff and Anna compete in an ice-carving contest and Elsa is the judge. Kristoff is an ice expert, but Anna has never carved ice before.

programme.title: Family Game Night
programme.desc: Enjoy the journey with your favorite Disney and Pixar characters during bedtime. Play some games with Anna and Elsa, watch Minnie's cat with Mickey and the nephews, and embark on a Scamp adventure.

programme.title: Big Snowman, Little Snowman
programme.desc: Join the main characters of Frozen as they demonstrate a variety of fun and silly opposites.

programme.title: The Journey Home
programme.desc: Arlo the dinosaur lives with his family. He is scared but wishes to be brave. When a wild boy named Spot steals food from him, the dinosaur runs after him! Watch as they find their way back home.

programme.title: Christmas Around The World
programme.desc: A festive journey around the world exploring unique Christmas traditions, cultures, and celebrations that highlight love, joy, and the magic of togetherness.

programme.title: Song Of The Sirenas
programme.desc: Elena visits the West Coast of Avalor, meets mysterious underwater creatures called sirenas, and encounters the evil sorceress Shuriki once again!

programme.title: A Trick for Hook
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! With this collection of spooky Halloween stories, little ones will be tricked and treated off to sleep with some of their favorite Disney and Pixar characters.

programme.title: Zootopia
programme.desc: Welcome to Zootopia, a animal city where anyone can be anything! When Judy Hopps-the first-ever bunny cop-arrives, she discovers that being a bunny on a police force of tough animals isn't so easy.

programme.title: Bella'S Big Break
programme.desc: Doc McStuffins helps Bella the ballerina doll overcome her fear after breaking her leg. With friends' support, Bella learns to dance again, proving courage and care can heal both body and spirit.

programme.title: The Evil Queen
programme.desc: The Evil Queen is no longer the fairest in the land and orders her Huntsman to kill her. But Snow White is alive and living in the forest. Follow the Evil Queen takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: The Great Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Disney characters prepare for spring in charming tales! This collection offers narrated stories perfect for reading aloud. Enjoy fun and quick five-minute adventures anytime!

programme.title: Super Animals
programme.desc: Meet Judy Hopps, the bunny police officer, and her trickster friend, Nick Wilde, as they work together to solve a terrible crime in the amazing animal city of Zootopia. There anyone can be anything!

programme.title: A Day Without Pumbaa
programme.desc: Pumbaa, a warthog in the jungle is the best friend to a meerkat and lion cub. Follow along with word-for-word narration as Simba and Timon learn to appreciate their favorite disaster.

programme.title: Meet A.R.F
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! Bob builds a robotic helper for this pug pups in this Pre-Level 1 reader.

programme.title: Radiator Springs 500 1/2
programme.desc: Lightning and his companions concur that Stanley, the man who founded Radiator Springs. Lightning forced to defend Stanley's honour when Sandy interrupt the festivities and challenge him to a race.

programme.title: Fuli Finds Her Place
programme.desc: The Lion Guard gathers for dinner, but Fuli hunts alone, worrying her friends about her solitary ways and potential dangers.

programme.title: Hawaii Pug-O
programme.desc: In Hawaii Pug-O, Bingo and Rolly's adventures lead them all the way to the Aloha State in this storybook with word for word narration.

programme.title: Radiator Springs 500 1/2
programme.desc: Lightning and his companions concur that Stanley, the man who founded Radiator Springs. Lightning forced to defend Stanley's honour when Sandy interrupt the festivities and challenge him to a race.

programme.title: The Great Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Disney characters prepare for spring in charming tales! This collection offers narrated stories perfect for reading aloud. Enjoy fun and quick five-minute adventures anytime!

programme.title: Christmas Around The World
programme.desc: A festive journey around the world exploring unique Christmas traditions, cultures, and celebrations that highlight love, joy, and the magic of togetherness.

programme.title: Happy Valentine'S Day
programme.desc: Celebrate Valentine's Day with Mickey, Minnie, and friends! Enjoy three sweet stories about sharing love and fun. Perfect for preschoolers learning about Valentine's traditions.

programme.title: Old Mcmickey Had A Farm
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends are fixing up a farm. A runaway tractor ruins everything before the mayor's visit! Mickey must stop the tractor, repair the farm, and save the day.

programme.title: One Unicorny Day
programme.desc: All your favorite Disney Junior characters are present in this anthology of stories. Join Zany's adventures with Mickey and friends and complete missions with Bingo and Rolly.

programme.title: A Walk In The Park
programme.desc: Minnie, Daisy, and Cuckoo-Loca enjoy a dog walk until a hot dog cart appears. The pups chase it, leading to chaos. Minnie tries to regain control before things get too ruff!

programme.title: Mickey'S Spooky Night
programme.desc: Read about your favorite Disney characters and their spooky adventures!

programme.title: Mickey And The Beanstalk
programme.desc: Featuring six classic Mickey Mouse tales, this collection of stories is perfect for little ones at bedtime or any time!

programme.title: Mickey'S Birthday
programme.desc: It's Mickey Mouse's birthday, and he's sure his friends are throwing him a party. There's just one problem . . . there are no signs of a party. Have Mickey's friends forgotten all about his big day?

programme.title: Mickey's Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Join Mickey and his friends in a series of tales that will warm your heart. In this story, mean old Ebenezer Scrooge is visited by several ghosts urging him to be more generous and kind-hearted.

programme.title: Mickey'S Spooky Night
programme.desc: Read about your favorite Disney characters and their spooky adventures!

programme.title: Vote For Minnie
programme.desc: Minnie runs for president of the Adventure Club. But Pete is also running! Who will win and be elected the next president?

programme.title: Mickey And The Kitten-Sitters
programme.desc: Enjoy quick, charming Disney and Pixar bedtime stories! Join Anna, Elsa, Mickey, Minnie, and Scamp in exciting adventures. These five-minute tales are perfect for ending the day.

programme.title: Minnie Saves Christmas
programme.desc: With this sweet collection of Disney Christmas stories, little ones are sure to be carried off to sleep full of holiday cheer.

programme.title: The Haunted Halloween
programme.desc: With this collection of spooky Halloween stories, little ones will be tricked and treated off to sleep with some of their favorite Disney and Pixar characters.

programme.title: Minnie's Surprise
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy are hired to babysit Clara Cluck's egg, but it begins to hatch on their watch! Follow as the Happy Helpers try to get the mama hen and her egg back together in time.

programme.title: Race For The Rigatoni Ribbon
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang head to Italy to compete in the Race for the Rigatoni Ribbon. Do the Roadster Racers have a chance at winning the race? Follow along with word-for-word narration to find out!

programme.title: A Hot-Dog Day
programme.desc: When Minnie plans a picnic for Daisy and friends, they all pitch in with the help of a misplaced basket.

programme.title: Minnie-rella
programme.desc: The fairy tale is based on the story of Cindrella. Minnie Mouse falls asleep while doing chores and dreams that she becomes Minnierella! She needs help to get ready for Prince Mickey's Grand Ball.

programme.title: Colors All Around
programme.desc: Join Mickey, Minnie, and the rest of the gane as they search for their favorite colors. Follow along with word-for-word narration and help them find all the colors in the rainbow!

programme.title: Mickey Saves Santa
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends are all ready for a Christmas Eve sleepover at the Clubhouse. They've written their lists and can't wait for Santa Claus to arrive. Santa won't be coming unless he gets some help!

programme.title: Mickey's Easter Hunt
programme.desc: The Clubhouse pals are throwing an Easter party and Pete's upset because he thinks he isn't invited. Pete decides to make a change in the Clubhouse, he makes it disappear-with the friends still inside!

programme.title: Mickey's Halloween Treat
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends want to go to the Tower, for the Halloween party but, they have to get there before the moon is full! Toodles and Mouseketools are what Mickey need to find on his way to the tower.

programme.title: Minnie's Rainbow
programme.desc: In this colorful tale, Minnie Mouse simply explains how these beautiful apparitions are formed. Follow the narration as Minnie and her Clubhouse pals begin to see a world of rainbows around them.

programme.title: Top O' The Clubhouse
programme.desc: It's Saint Patrick's Day. Mickey and the gang are ready to celebrate! But when Pete's shenanigans threaten to ruin their celebration, it will take some help from Toodles, to get the party back on track.

programme.title: Homesick
programme.desc: Being sick is no fun for anyone, but Funny's sneezes are extra funny! Every sneeze sends Mickey, Minnie, and the rest of the gang through the wrong Adventure Doors. Will Funny ever feel better?

programme.title: Donald'S Stinky Day
programme.desc: When Donald accidentally rescues a cute little skunk, the grateful little stinker refuses to leave his side!

programme.title: Mickey'S Perfecto Day
programme.desc: Mickey and the Roadster Racers head to Madrid, Spain for some racing and sightseeing fun. But when a baby bull begins to chase them around town, their perfecto vacation starts to crumble!

programme.title: Ski Trippin
programme.desc: The gang is teaching Daisy to ski when she accidentally ends up in the middle of aa big skiing race! Using the skills she's learned along the way, can she pull off a big win?

programme.title: Hocus Bow-Cus
programme.desc: Minnie is launching her new 'Bows are Magical' fashion line. He forgot his bow tie at home, he rushes off to find it. Millie and Melody rehearsed with Penguini, but will they remember all the tricks?

programme.title: Minnie's Pet Salon
programme.desc: Minnie and friends get ready to pamper their pets at Minnie's Pet Salon! It's a spa day like no other for Pluto, Figaro, Bella, Butch, and Mr. Pettibone!

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Sparkle-izer
programme.desc: Who's been using Minnie's new Sparkle-izer? When Minnie needs it to decorate her customers' bows, the Super Sparkle-izer turns up missing! It's up to Millie and Melody to solve the mystifying mystery!

programme.title: Always In Fashion
programme.desc: Minnie Mouse is always in fashion! She and Daisy love making bows at Minnie's Bow-tique. All of their friends want Minnie to make them bows.

programme.title: Blooming Bows
programme.desc: Minnie's nieces are very upset! The paper petals on their costumes are falling apart. Now, it''s up to Minnie to redesign the girls' costumes. But can she do it in time for the school's Posy Pageant?

programme.title: Bow-Bot Robot
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy get some help from a bow-making robot in this retelling of an episode of Disney Junior's Minnie's Bow Toons.

programme.title: Easter Bonnet Parade
programme.desc: Read along with Disney! One day, a little puppy with nowhere to go arrived at the Main Street USA train station. Seeking for a place to call his own, follow along as the little pup explores the town.

programme.title: Trouble Times Two
programme.desc: Movie star Penelope Poodle has come to Minnie''s Bow-Tique to find something perfect to wear. But when Minnie''s mischievous twin nieces, Millie and Melody, come for a visit, it''s Trouble Times Two!

programme.title: Year Round Fun
programme.desc: Book with magnet set in a case

programme.title: Riches To Rags
programme.desc: A young boy is taken to work by his Papa and Grandpa in an old wooden boat. He discovers his family's unusual line of work and will decide whether to follow them or find his way.

programme.title: Blue-Ribbon Bunny
programme.desc: Sofia and her bunny Clover enter a pet contest. Other kids have fancy pets. Sofia must decide: enter with a fancy pet or stay loyal to her best friend, Clover.

programme.title: Clover Time
programme.desc: When Clover's warren floods, Sofia invites her to move in. They love sharing a room-at first. But Sofia soon learns that being roommates isn't always easy in this fun story!

programme.title: Just One Of The Princes
programme.desc: Sofia wants to try out for a spot on Royal Prep's Flying Derby team, but Amber, Prince Hugo, and her classmates tell Sofia that Flying Derby is not a 'princess thing.'

programme.title: The Missing Necklace
programme.desc: When the Amulet of Avalor goes missing, Sofia loses her ability to understand her friends. Longing to talk to her friends again, Sofia sets off to find it. Cedric is also after the missing amulet.

programme.title: Welcome To Royal Prep
programme.desc: At Royal Prep's Open House, Amber's special painting gets ruined by James! Can Sofia help her fix it before her parents arrive? Find out in this exciting story!

programme.title: Me And Our Mom
programme.desc: Sofia is so excited to spend the day with her mom at the annual Mother's Day Picnic -until she learns that Amber and James are joining too. Sofia wants her mom to herself on Mother's Day!

programme.title: The Curse Of Princess Ivy
programme.desc: In this beautifully illustrated eBook, Sofia faces grave danger when she faces Princess Ivy, a once-exiled princess who is determined to take over Enchancia and turn the whole kingdom black and white.

programme.title: A Royal Mouse In The House
programme.desc: It's the Enchancia Pet Show! Hildegard's mink, Lulu, runs away, and Hildegard turns into a mouse! Sofia and Clover must solve the mystery and reverse the spell before the show begins.

programme.title: Princess Sofia'S Busy Day
programme.desc: Today is another busy day in the kingdom of Enchancia for Princess Sofia. Join Sofia and see what an ordinary day is like for this new princess!

programme.title: Royal Fun
programme.desc: Life in Enchancia is full of fun! Join Sofia as she explores all the fun things there are to do-from dancing to joining the flying derby team and even spending the day at the Village Faire.
